summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory Item Detail feature (iteration_69) - all tests passed. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed covering GET /api/inventory-ledger/item-detail endpoint structure, balance fields, settings, reorder recommendation, exception flags, history preview, type_summary, error handling (404/422), and regression tests. Frontend: ItemDetailDrawer opens from Balances table (via history button), Reorder tab (click item), and Exceptions tab (click item). Drawer displays: balance strip (5 fields), exception badges (SHORT/REORDER/NO INCOMING), reorder settings, reorder status with recommended qty, history preview with movement details, action buttons (Full History, Create Supply). Full History button opens ItemHistoryModal correctly.

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking (same as previous iterations)
Pre-existing Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility enhancement opportunity

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/item-detail?customer_id=X&item=Y - Returns complete detail payload
Backend: item-detail - Balance fields: on_hand, incoming, committed, available, status, warehouse, ownership_type
Backend: item-detail - Settings included when configured (SPAM-LITE has threshold=600, buffer=150)
Backend: item-detail - Settings null when not configured, reorder uses defaults (threshold=0, buffer=10)
Backend: item-detail - Reorder recommendation when applicable (is_reorder_recommended=true, recommended_qty>0)
Backend: item-detail - Reorder not recommended for OK items above threshold
Backend: item-detail - Exception flags: short, low, reorder, no_incoming correctly set
Backend: item-detail - History preview returns up to 10 movements with movement_type, quantity_delta, created_at
Backend: item-detail - type_summary has movement_type_totals
Backend: item-detail - 404 for nonexistent item
Backend: item-detail - 422 for missing item param
Backend REGRESSION: Dashboard summary still works
Backend REGRESSION: Exceptions endpoint still works
Backend REGRESSION: Snapshot export still works
Backend REGRESSION: CSV import endpoint available
Frontend: Clicking item history button in Balances table opens ItemDetailDrawer (data-testid='inv-item-detail-drawer')
Frontend: Clicking item in Reorder table opens ItemDetailDrawer
Frontend: Clicking item in Exceptions table opens ItemDetailDrawer
Frontend: Detail drawer shows balance strip (data-testid='inv-detail-balance') with 5 values
Frontend: Detail drawer shows exception badges when applicable (data-testid='inv-detail-exceptions')
Frontend: Detail drawer shows reorder settings (data-testid='inv-detail-settings')
Frontend: Detail drawer shows reorder status (data-testid='inv-detail-reorder') with recommended qty
Frontend: Detail drawer shows history preview (data-testid='inv-detail-history') with movement table
Frontend: Detail drawer has action buttons (data-testid='inv-detail-actions')
Frontend: Full History button opens ItemHistoryModal (data-testid='inv-detail-full-history')
Frontend: Create Supply button visible when reorder is recommended (data-testid='inv-detail-action-supply')
critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 612-701: /item-detail endpoint correctly aggregates balance from derive_balances, retrieves item settings, calculates reorder recommendation, sets exception flags, and fetches history preview
Backend: Uses existing reorder logic - threshold/buffer from settings or defaults (0/10)
Backend: Exception flags correctly derived - short (from is_short), low (from is_low), reorder (from calculation), no_incoming (short/low with incoming=0)
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 693-858: ItemDetailDrawer component properly fetches and displays all item detail sections
Frontend: Drawer opens from all three tabs (Balances via history button, Reorder via item click, Exceptions via item click)
Frontend: Create Supply button conditionally rendered only when reorder.is_reorder_recommended is true
seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace - tested items: SPAM-LITE (SHORT, has settings with threshold=600, buffer=150), SPAM-12OZ (OK status), IMPORT-ITEM-B (SHORT), TEST-ITEM-WARN (SHORT with 5000 committed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Item Detail feature fully tested. Endpoint: GET /api/inventory-ledger/item-detail (customer_id and item required). Returns: item, customer_id, balance (on_hand, incoming, committed, available, status, warehouse, ownership_type, unit_of_measure, item_description), settings (null or {reorder_threshold, safety_buffer, notes}), reorder (is_reorder_recommended, recommended_qty, reorder_threshold, safety_buffer), exceptions (short, low, reorder, no_incoming), history_preview (array up to 10), history_total (int), type_summary (dict). Frontend: ItemDetailDrawer component (data-testid='inv-item-detail-drawer') opens from Balances (inv-history-btn-{i}), Reorder (inv-reorder-item-{i}), Exceptions (inv-exc-item-{i}). Sections: inv-detail-balance, inv-detail-exceptions (if applicable), inv-detail-settings, inv-detail-reorder, inv-detail-history, inv-detail-actions. Action buttons: inv-detail-full-history (opens ItemHistoryModal), inv-detail-action-supply (only when reorder recommended).

sections.balance_strip: inv-detail-balance (5 values: On Hand, Incoming, Committed, Available, Status)
sections.exception_badges: inv-detail-exceptions (SHORT, LOW, REORDER, NO INCOMING - shown when applicable)
sections.reorder_status: inv-detail-reorder (Reorder Recommended + qty or 'Stock levels OK')
sections.history_preview: inv-detail-history (table with Type, Qty, Reference, Date)
